title: Infinity Pixelmon
description: A lightweight and performance-optimized Pixelmon modpack focused on a smooth survival experience, combining quality of life mods and visual improvements for an immersive journey.
body: # 🌟 Welcome to Infinity Pixelmon! Get ready for hours of fun exploring the ultimate Pixelmon universe in a **fully optimized, welcoming, and content-rich environment**. Whether you're a veteran trainer or just starting your journey, there's a place for you here. ## 🎮 About Our Modpack The **Infinity Pixelmon** modpack was engineered with accessibility and performance in mind. Built on **Minecraft 1.12.2** with **Pixelmon 8.4.3**, our custom server architecture is rigorously optimized to ensure a smooth, lag-free experience, even on low-end computers. You get all the quality and immersion of the Pixelmon world with rock-solid stability. ## ✨ What Awaits You? Our primary goal is to deliver a fun, balanced, and highly rewarding adventure. When you dive into Infinity Pixelmon, you'll discover: * **⚙️ Unique Custom Systems:** Carefully tailored mechanics to enhance your gameplay and quality of life. * **📈 Custom Progression Path:** A balanced and motivating journey designed to keep you engaged at every step. * **🏆 Meaningful Achievements:** Every capture, every battle, and every milestone is a true mark of your progress. ## 🔗 Join Our Community! Stay updated, meet other trainers, and start your journey today! * **🌐 Website:** [infinitypixelmon.com](https://infinitypixelmon.com/) * **💬 Discord:** [Join our server!](https://discord.gg/DMdHnAucmH) *Your legacy as a Pokémon Master starts here!* --- *Pixelmon Mod powered by: [PixelmonMod.com](https://pixelmonmod.com/)*
